description: Expected findings Phase 11 SHOULD surface against the KeygroupSummary-shape fixture. See keygroup-summary-repro.test.ts for the assertions that pin each expectation.

before.label: Inventory-only state (Phase 1-10) — BEFORE the gap was closed

patternMatrix.rationale: Legacy regex catalog matches none of the shapes that distinguish KeygroupSummary (zero canonical-primitive imports + many utility-class hits) from any other tsx file. Issue #315 shipped in this state.

after.label: Phase 11 loop state — AFTER the gap was closed

expectedKeygroupSummaryFires.rationale: File matches components/**/*.tsx glob, zero @/components/common/* imports, >= 14 utility-class hits clears the secondary threshold.
KeygroupSummary's className composition diverges from healthy siblings by > thresholdSigma standard deviations.

expectedCoverageRatioLessThanOne.rationale: 1 of 3 directory files contains a canonical-primitive import (HealthySummary + SiblingPanel do; KeygroupSummary does not).

discoveredCandidates.rationale: Mediation layer clusters the negative-space + outlier hits on KeygroupSummary.tsx into at least one architectural-scale candidate; orchestrator-agent translates to discovered_candidates: manifest section.
